video:video.video:title: Soldrift GitHub Main Profile Links to Telegram @devbeast5775 — OSINT Evidence
video:video.video:description: OSINT video record showing the Soldrift GitHub main profile path and its visible connection to Telegram @devbeast5775. This video supports the Soldrift / devbeast5775 / hodlwarden identity-cluster warning archive.

video:video.video:title: Soldrift / Hodlwarden Pump.fun Bundler Overlap — GitHub OSINT Evidence
video:video.video:description: OSINT video record documenting Soldrift / Hodlwarden Pump.fun bundler overlap and related GitHub repository context. This video supports the Solana bot, bundler, wallet-access, private-key exposure, and malicious-backdoor risk frame.

video:video.video:title: Two GitHub Identities Same Telegram Contact Path — OSINT Evidence
video:video.video:description: OSINT video record comparing two GitHub identity paths that appear to lead toward the same Telegram contact route. This video supports the alias-cluster concern involving Soldrift, devbeast5775, hodlwarden, and related developer-account infrastructure.

video:video.video:title: Hodlwarden GitHub Contact Path to Telegram @devbeast5775 — OSINT Evidence
video:video.video:description: OSINT video record documenting the Hodlwarden GitHub contact path and its connection to Telegram @devbeast5775. This video explains why hodlwarden is indexed with Soldrift and devbeast5775 in the same public OSINT identity-cluster warning.

video:video.video:title: Soldrift / Hodlwarden / devbeast5775 Scam Warning — GitHub, Telegram, Solana Bot OSINT Evidence
video:video.video:description: OSINT video record for the broader Soldrift / Hodlwarden / devbeast5775 scam-warning archive, combining GitHub, Telegram, Solana bot-risk, wallet-drainer, phishing, and backdoor concern evidence into one public Web3 safety notice.

video:video.video:title: This Was Not a Simple Scam — Soldrift / Hodlwarden Credibility Infrastructure Fraud
video:video.video:description: OSINT overview video framing the case as a credibility-infrastructure fraud concern involving developer branding, public-profile trust signals, GitHub and Telegram identity paths, and a suspected organized crypto cybercrime-network warning.
